summary: Comprehensive testing of SaintSal Labs Platform v3 new features: Business Plan AI, Patent/IP Search, 10-step Formation Wizard, CookinCards Scan, and Recently Used in Command Palette. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major features working correctly.

minor.issue: Duplicate endpoint in server.py (line 14842) overrides router version. Server.py expects 'image' (base64) while router expects 'image_url' or 'image_base64'. Frontend uses correct format but API signature is inconsistent.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health - Returns 200 with version info
Backend: POST /api/business/plan - SSE streaming working, returns section events
Backend: POST /api/business/plan validation - Returns 400 for missing idea_description
Backend: POST /api/business/patent-search - Returns prior_art and fto_analysis
Backend: POST /api/business/patent-search (minimal) - Works with just tech description
Backend: POST /api/business/patent-search validation - Returns 400 for missing description
Backend: POST /api/launchpad/name-check - Returns domains, trademark_conflicts, state_available
Backend: POST /api/launchpad/name-check validation - Returns 400 for missing business_name
Backend: POST /api/launchpad/entity-advisor - Returns recommended_entity, rationale, tax_implications
Backend: POST /api/launchpad/entity/ein - Returns ein_status (or 404 for non-existent order)
Backend: POST /api/launchpad/dns/configure - Returns records_created (or 400 if GoDaddy not configured)
Backend: POST /api/launchpad/dns/configure validation - Returns 400 for missing domain
Backend: POST /api/launchpad/ssl/provision - Returns ssl_status and domain
Backend: POST /api/launchpad/ssl/provision validation - Returns 400 for missing domain
Backend: POST /api/launchpad/compliance/setup - Returns calendar_events array
Backend: POST /api/cards/scan - Returns matches array (Google Vision integration)
Backend: POST /api/cards/scan validation - Returns 400 for missing image
Backend: POST /api/cards/grade - Returns overall_grade, centering, corners, edges, surface
Backend: POST /api/cards/grade validation - Returns 400 for missing image
Backend: POST /api/cards/collection/add - Returns status:added with card object
Backend: GET /api/cards/collection - Returns collection array with total_cards
Backend: GET /api/cards/market/trending - Returns trending cards array
Backend: POST /api/career/cover-letter - Still working (regression test)
Backend: GET /api/verticals/trending - Still working (regression test)
Frontend: Command Palette opens via Ctrl+K
Frontend: Command Palette shows Recently Used section after navigation
Frontend: Business Center has 9 tabs (Overview, Formation, Domains, Resume, Signatures, Business Plan, IP/Patent, Meetings, Analytics)
Frontend: Business Plan AI tab has form with idea, target market, stage fields and Generate button
Frontend: IP/Patent tab has Technology Description, Competitors fields and Search button
Frontend: Formation Wizard shows 10-step progress bar
Frontend: Formation Step 1 (Business Type) - Entity selection and state dropdown working
Frontend: Formation Step 2 (Name Check) - API integration working, shows domain/trademark results
Frontend: Formation Step 3 (Entity Advisor) - AI recommendation API working
Frontend: CookinCards has 5 tabs (Price, Scan, Deals, Portfolio, Rare)
Frontend: CookinCards Scan tab has file upload, URL input, TCG/Sports toggle
critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate /api/cards/scan endpoint: server.py line 14842 overrides router version in cards.py. Consider removing duplicate or consolidating logic.
test_credentials: No authentication required for tested endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: Business Plan AI (SSE streaming), Patent/IP Search, 10-step Formation Wizard (Name Check, Entity Advisor, EIN, DNS, SSL, Compliance endpoints), CookinCards Scan (5 tabs with file upload and URL input), Command Palette Recently Used (localStorage-based). Note: /api/cards/scan has duplicate endpoint in server.py that uses Google Vision instead of Ximilar - frontend uses correct format.
